name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: San Antonio, TX: PLS Check Cashers at 1107 S WW White Rd offers 24/7 check cashing and financial services to locals.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates 24/7 at 1107 S WW White Rd in San Antonio, TX, providing check cashing and payment services to the local South Side community. This standalone location is open around the clock, making it convenient for shift workers and those needing urgent financial services at any hour.

At this San Antonio location, PLS Check Cashers offers check cashing for personal and business checks, money transfer services, bill payment options, and prepaid card services. Call +1 210-881-8010 to confirm services or ask about rates before visiting.

When you need to cash a check at night or on a holiday in San Antonio, TX, this South White Road location has you covered with immediate payment options. Bring a valid ID and the check you want to cash. PLS Check Cashers has been a trusted local payment option for San Antonio residents for years.
address: 1107 S WW White Rd, San Antonio, TX 78220

company_info.headquarters: 1107 S WW White Rd, San Antonio, TX 78220

pros: All services available 24/7 — including check cashing, DMV, and notary
Illinois DMV services on-site: registration renewals, title transfers, license plates, city stickers
Ria Money Transfer available for international remittances
Xpectations! PLUS Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app for unbanked consumers
Foreign currency exchange offered at the same location
Notary services for legal documents (wills, deeds, power of attorney)
ATMs, phone top-ups, and fax/copy round out a one-stop service model
cons: No fee schedule published on the website — consumers cannot compare costs before visiting
Check cashing fees at non-bank providers typically run 1–5%, making it expensive for regular use
Prepaid Mastercard does not build credit history
Not FDIC-insured — no savings, interest, or deposit protections available
Primarily a physical-location service with no apparent online account management beyond the Xpectations app
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Illinois residents who want to combine DMV errands (registration, title) with financial transactions in one stop
Immigrants and workers needing to send money internationally via Ria Money Transfer
Consumers who need financial services outside of standard business hours
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked Illinois consumers who need 24/7 access to check cashing, bill pay, and DMV services in a single location. The main caveat is cost: check-cashing fees are not disclosed upfront and will exceed what a free checking account would charge, so PLS is a convenience solution rather than an economical long-term financial home.
meta_description: San Antonio, TX check cashing: PLS Check Cashers at 1107 S WW White Rd provides 24/7 check cashing services.
